'''鈭歵h-n-k-k''' ('''kathankekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyclicize|cyclicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyclicize|cyclicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-n-k-k
|-
! Lemma
| kathankekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithankekoko|thithankekoko]] || [[word:jithankekoko|jithankekoko]] || [[word:shithankekoko|shithankekoko]] || [[word:kithankekoko|kithankekoko]]
